title: aira collina
intro: Aira collina, also known as meadow bent or early bent, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Aira collina has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting respiratory health. Aira collina can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil to be used in herbal remedies, however, further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
